response.justification: While the candidate brings extensive software engineering experience and recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure, the resume does not clearly demonstrate the long-standing strategic AI leadership and recognized expertise at the Principal/Director level required for this AI Strategy role.
strengths: Broad and deep multi-platform engineering expertise.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive and community engagement.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure.
concerns: Limited explicit strategic AI leadership experience.
No clear "recognized expertise" in building AI platforms.
Seniority titles don't consistently align with Director-level IC.
